response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC of 0.26 is only marginally above my minimum threshold of 0.25, and my own battery approaches critical levels; sharing 0.5 kWh would breach my survival margin and create cascade risk I cannot absorb.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
